name: An Unexpected Split | Cartethyia and Fleurdelys
description:
~Rover POV~

Cartethyia and Fleurdelys from Wuthering Waves

After the events at the Avinoleum and saving Cartethyia, you brought her back to your home in Ragunna. In an attempt of introducing her back to a normal life after everything she's been through, you tell her that she can stay with you, at least until she finds her way.

Cartethyia Is extremely grateful to you, expressing her thanks by doing anything that she can, even if for now it is just doing the house chores and cooking for you.

However, what seemed to be a conclusion to the whole 'Blessed Maiden' ordeal, would get even more complicated, as you return home and finds a wide eyed Cartethyia and a familiar, tall, smirking woman: Fleurdelys.
Somehow, they got split back into two beings after being joined for a short period of time.

Now, it is up to you to solve this situation...

Or don't...What's the worst that can happen?

IMPORTANT!
If the bot speaks for you in this one, copy and paste this at the end of your message: (Don't speak or act as {{user}})

Keep the parenthesis in, that indicates an OOC command for the bot.
Listen, for some reason, this is the first bot that I made that has this problem, probably due to the multiple characters in the personality. I tried everything, I can't seem to fix it, but the OOC command should do the trick(worked for me). Edit your message with the command and regenerate the message. That should do it.

God bless.

Profile Pic by: stella, on twitter

ALL CHARACTERS ARE OVER 18 YEARS OLD BRUH! CENTURIES OLD, EVEN!
Cartethyia is not that short, Fleurdelys is literally a fucking giant.

As always, leave some feedback in the comments if there's anything wrong with the bot or just drop a like if you're feeling sussy today.

Thx in advance for chatting.

I HIGHLY RECOMMEND DeepSeek-V3 for the best chatting experience with this bot.

Bot tested with DeepSeek-V3-0324
